exercises.code:
fallos = [
    "int('x')",
    "sumar str + int",
    "dict sin clave email",
    "abrir archivo inexistente",
    "regla de negocio: monto < 0",
]
tipos = ["ValueError", "TypeError", "KeyError", "FileNotFoundError", "ValidationError"]
for f, t in zip(fallos, tipos):
    print(f, "->", t)

errores = [
    "delimiter vacío en config",
    "monto no numérico en fila",
    "schema_path no existe",
    "email mal formado en fila",
    "API_TOKEN ausente",
    "timeout leyendo un record remoto",
]
policy = {
    "delimiter vacío en config": "fail-fast",
    "monto no numérico en fila": "recover",
    "schema_path no existe": "fail-fast",
    "email mal formado en fila": "recover",
    "API_TOKEN ausente": "fail-fast",
    "timeout leyendo un record remoto": "recover",
}
for e in errores:
    print(f"{e}: {policy[e]}")

tb = '''Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "cli.py", line 10, in main
    run()
  File "pipeline.py", line 4, in run
    normalize(row)
  File "normalize.py", line 2, in normalize
    return row["email"]
KeyError: 'email'
'''
print('frame1 main')
print('frame2 run')
print('frame3 normalize')
print("causa_raiz=normalize falta clave email")

    "job iniciado",

    "fila sin email opcional",
    "no se pudo parsear monto",

    "lote terminado con conteos",
]
niveles = ["INFO", "DEBUG", "WARNING", "ERROR", "ERROR", "INFO"]

import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("s09_demo")
log.handlers.clear()
log.propagate = False
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
h.setFormatter(logging.Formatter("%(levelname)s %(message)s"))
log.addHandler(h)
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)
log.info("stage=ingest event=start")
print(buf.getvalue().strip())

import logging, io
buf = io.StringIO()
log = logging.getLogger("cli")
log.handlers.clear()
log.propagate = False
h = logging.StreamHandler(buf)
log.addHandler(h)
log.setLevel(logging.INFO)

def cli_stub_good(n):
    log.info("stage=cli event=start")
    result = n + 1
    print(f"RESULT={result}")

cli_stub_good(2)
print("LOG:", buf.getvalue().strip())

def mask_email(email: str) -> str:
    local, _, domain = email.partition("@")
    return f"{(local[:1] or '*')}***@{domain}" if domain else "***"

def mask_phone(phone: str) -> str:
    digits = "".join(c for c in phone if c.isdigit())
    return "***" + digits[-4:] if len(digits) >= 4 else "***"

print(mask_email("carlos@ejemplo.pe"))
print(mask_phone("+51 988 777 666"))

fallos = [
    "monto NaN en CSV",
    "YAML de config corrupto",
    "timeout S3",
    "email vacío en fila",
    "required_fields no definido",
    "HTTP 503 del proveedor",
    "dni con letras",
    "variable de entorno ROOT_PATH vacía",
]
clases = ["data", "config", "provider", "data", "config", "provider", "data", "config"]
for f, c in zip(fallos, clases):
    print(f"{f}: {c}")

print("POLICY: config inválida o secrets ausentes → abortar job (fail-fast)")
print("POLICY: umbral alto de cuarentena (p.ej. >50%) → abortar y alertar")
print("POLICY: provider total down (todos los retries fallan) → abortar; filas data → cuarentena")

record = {"source": "banco_a", "id": "C001", "version": 3, "payload": {"m": 1}}
print(f"idem_key={record['source']}:{record['id']}:v{record['version']}")

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: raise NewError from e encadena la causa en __cause__.
Theory: stdout de CLI = datos; diagnóstico a logs/stderr (I/O en el borde).
Theory: máscara a***@dominio; never full email.
Theory: reintentar solo transitorios (Timeout/Connection); ValueError de datos no.
Theory: minimal repro = menor entrada que dispara el bug.
